capabilities_used.evidence: 他反复用 BTC/ETH 强弱来判断山寨与 AI 板块轮动，例如 [2025-05-31] “BTC chilling at $100k and altcoins are getting obliterated”，[2025-01-31] “the entire market is down & ethereum is up… led to anything good”，[2024-11-30] “Meme coin money rotating into AI coins”，[2025-10-31] “$TAO going to start AI alt szn”.
他经常把市场定义为 chop / 区间环境，例如 [2024-06-28] “probably have another month of chop”，[2025-10-30] “Wake me up when this chop ends”。图表也大量使用横向支撑阻力箱体，而不是复杂指标。
[2025-01-29] 连续发 “FOMC day pray that we get something positive for the markets” 与 “Holy fuck FOMC volatility bringing us back to prices we haven't seen in 1 hour”，说明他把 FOMC 当作明确事件驱动和风险控制节点。
典型图表几乎都是水平位交易：Image #2/#3/#4/#7 用多条横线标出关键支撑阻力，Image #5/#8 则给出价格在区间位之间来回测试后的运行路径，体现明显的箱体/区间高低点框架。
他的路径图经常先预期向下扫一层流动性再反转，例如 Image #5 白线先跌破当前位靠近红线 1.1175 后再向上收复多层阻力；Image #8 也先向下扫到 92.9k/91.5k 一带再上冲 95k+。文字上他也常说“Markets bottom on max fear”。
[2024-11-30] “Tops not in on $ETH until Fidelity or blackrock ETFs bid $1B in a day” 说明他用 ETF 资金流当作趋势是否见顶/继续的重要代理指标。

他会把美股风险偏好映射到加密，例如 [2024-06-28] “Stocks making new ATH’s  🤝  Crypto choppy as hell”，[2024-07-31] “Stocks absolutely sending   🤝  Crypto choppy as fuck”，[2025-08-29] “come back on Tuesday when the stock market opens back up”。
虽然整体风格激进，但会给出失效位，[2026-02-28] “I am scaling into longs here… Wrong below $60k”，这是典型的先定义 invalidation 再建仓。
他频繁强调极端波动与情绪切换，例如 [2025-03-30] “one of the wildest weeks in the market”，[2025-01-29] “It’s so over to we are so back in the matter of minutes”。这说明他识别并交易高波动 regime。
[2025-09-30] “We dump early October get everyone bearish then teleport to new ATH’s by end of month” 本质上是在预设先破坏情绪/假跌破，再反向拉升；这与他的多张路径图中先下杀再收复关键位的思路一致。
他会用“parabolic”描述最后一段加速行情，例如 [2024-11-30] “$ZIG looking ready to go parabolic”，[2025-09-29] “when $BTC does get a parabola how quickly it will double / triple”。虽然不是主框架，但会识别加速段。
他的表达更像等恐慌出清后接，而不是机械抄底；[2025-08-29] “big buying opportunity is coming soon”，[2026-02-28] “Markets bottom on fear & top on euphoria”，都暗示先等恐慌释放再切入。
图表中常见的是关键位收复后看趋势延续。Image #4 在 1.0293 与 1.4606 上方放量拉升到 1.93；Image #7 在长期底部后上破 0.0875，都是顺趋势看多表达。
虽然他不用 ICT 术语，但图上明显在交易“前阻力变支撑”的重测。Image #4 的 1.4606、Image #7 的 0.08751、Image #2/#3 的多层水平位都体现典型 breaker/reclaim 逻辑。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Horizontal Level Ladder Pathing
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Map price as a sequence of horizontal support/resistance levels and trade the most likely path from one level to the next, often with a brief sweep before continuation.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把价格拆解成一层层水平支撑/阻力位，交易从一个价位走向下一个价位的路径，常配合先扫流动性再延续。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: Image #2/#3/#4/#7 全是纯水平位框架；Image #5/#8 甚至直接画出白色预期路径，展示从一个水平位过渡到下一个水平位的路线图。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Narrative Sector Rotation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Rotate exposure aggressively between market narratives such as memes, AI, majors, and privacy based on relative strength, attention, and where fresh capital is likely to flow next.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 根据相对强弱、市场注意力和新增资金流向，在 meme、AI、主流币、隐私等叙事之间积极轮动仓位。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-11-30] “Meme coin money rotating into AI coins”，[2025-10-31] “$TAO going to start AI alt szn”，[2025-01-30] “AI round 2”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Calendar Sentiment Seasonality
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use month-end closes, Q4 seasonality, Uptober expectations, election windows, and holiday liquidity gaps as recurring timing edges for crypto positioning.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 利用月末收线、Q4 季节性、Uptober 预期、大选窗口和节假日流动性真空，作为加密仓位时点优势。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-09-30] “October playbook… Uptober”，[2024-09-30] “Q4 going into the presidential election”，[2024-10-31] “Monthly close fuckery”。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Fear Headline Bottoming
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Treat peak geopolitical or macro fear headlines as likely local bottoms if price refuses to make materially lower lows.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 若地缘或宏观恐慌消息冲击下价格拒绝显著创新低，则把极端恐慌新闻视为局部底部信号。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2026-02-28] “Bitcoin not making new lows and barely flinching on the attack of Iran… Good sign”，[2024-10-31] “Iran / Iraq fud again   This has marked every local low on this move up”。

personal_quirks.quote: October playbook  We dump early October get everyone bearish then teleport to new ATH’s by end of month   Uptober
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 偏好用月度/季节性脚本先设定市场情绪路径，再做反身性交易。

personal_quirks.quote: Markets bottom on max fear   Higher
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 最大恐慌时做反向看多，不在一致性悲观中追空。
先观察相对强弱，能抗跌的板块/币种优先配置。

personal_quirks.quote: Wake me up when this chop ends
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 识别震荡期时降低预期，不把所有行情都硬做成趋势行情。

personal_quirks.quote: I am scaling into longs here… Wrong below $60k
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 高 conviction 做多也必须给出明确失效位。

unique_traits: 他不是纯粹的教科书 TA 交易员，而是把极简水平位技术分析、叙事轮动和市场情绪传播结合在一起。图上方法很朴素，几乎只画关键横线和预期路径，但推文里会用 AI、Uptober、选举、ETF、地缘恐慌等叙事放大交易框架。整体上更像一个高贝塔、长偏置、擅长讲“下一波钱会流去哪”的轮动型交易员。

high_conviction_phrases: $TAO going to start AI alt szn
The most bullish scenario for the crypto market is playing out right now
Where we are headed you won’t need charts
low_conviction_phrases: could take a bit of time
might have to change my plans
